MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Robert C. Crane of BRYDON HUGO & PARKER (415-808-0300), appearing for defendant / moving party Pneumo Abex LLC successor in interest to Abex Corporation erroneously sued herein as Pneumo-Abex
Anne T. Acuna of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Ronald Keeling

RULING:
DEFENDANT PNEUMO ABEX LLC SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO ABEX CORPORATION ERRONEOUSLY SUED HEREIN AS PNEUMO-ABEX'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Pneumo Abex LLC successor in interest to Abex Corporation erroneously sued herein as Pneumo-Abex's motion for summary judgment is granted. Defendant sustained its initial burden. Plaintiff failed to present evidence creating a triable issue whether exposure to asbestos-containing products or materials attributable to defendant was a substantial factor in causing or contributing to his asbestos-related illness. Defendant's moving papers made clear that one of the grounds upon which it sought summary judgment was that plaintiff has no evidence that exposure to asbestos-containing Abex products was a substantial factor in his illness. Plaintiff was on notice that defendant sought summary judgment on this ground, had an opportunity to respond, and failed to do so. (See undisputed material fact no. 37. See also Luri v. Greenwald (2003) 107 Cal.App.4th 1119, 1125; Juge v. County of Sacramento (1993) 12 Cal.App.4th 59.) The court will note that defendant failed to sustain its burden of demonstrating that plaintiff does not possess evidence that he was exposed to a product attributable to defendant. Even if Mr. Indelicato's declaration is considered, when read in conjunction with plaintiff's deposition testimony it merely creates a triable issue whether the brake linings at issue were manufactured, sold and/or supplied by Abex. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Patricia Rodriguez of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #12436 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
